name: Toy Play Kitchen Food Fall 20pc - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Your little one will have loads of fun creating mouthwatering dishes for family with this 20-Piece Toy Play Kitchen Food Fall Set from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Crafted from wood and polyester, this kitchen playset includes a cheesecake, chicken, hand mittens, apron, and more that work equally well as a functional toy or homey decorative piece. As cute as it is fun to play with, this toy set is recommended for children aged two years and above.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
